title: bidens pilosa var. decomposita
intro: Bidens pilosa var. decomposita, also known as Creeping Beggar-ticks, is a variety of the Bidens pilosa plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa var. decomposita include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bidens pilosa var. decomposita can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
